raw_consumer_statement: XX/XX/XXXX an unknown transaction of XXXX was charged to my Citibank NA Costco card for a charge in the Costco Facility. On XX/XX/XXXX is when I noticed the charged and filed a fraud claim. XX/XX/XXXX the denied my claim, reasons because I still had the card in my possession, an authorized charge of XXXX was conducted moments prior in the same facility. I never purchased or utilized or authorized my card for a transaction of XXXX, never received confirmation or receipt, product or service. My usual charges in the card never exceeds $ XXXX ( 5 plus years ), lady on the phone rudely mentioned to escalate as necessary.
